name: Chocolate Chip and Dried Fruit Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
2. Press cookie dough into the bottom of an ungreased 12-inch pizza pan or 13x9-inch pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for 15 to 25 minutes, or until lightly golden brown. Cool completely.
4. Meanwhile, in a small saucepan over medium heat, combine dried fruit bits, coconut, and orange juice. Cook over medium heat until the juice is absorbed, about 10 minutes, stirring occasionally. Remove from heat; stir in marmalade. Refrigerate for 25 minutes to cool completely.
5. Spoon the cold fruit mixture evenly over the baked crust.
6. In a small saucepan over low heat, melt candy coating with oil, stirring constantly. Drizzle evenly over the fruit mixture.
7. Cut into squares to serve.
Makes 30 to 36 servings.
